summary: Testing iteration 37: Database Management System for SaaS Admin. All features tested: APIs (databases list, stats, logs, backups, freeze/unfreeze, backup creation, export) and UI (navigation, stats display, database table, sub-tabs). Backend: 100% (13/13 tests passed). Frontend: 100% - all tabs navigate correctly, stats display, database actions work.
critical_code_review_comments: APIs properly protected with get_super_admin dependency - only saas_admin can access
Main database correctly protected from freeze/delete operations (returns 400)
Backup operation correctly creates operation log entry for audit trail
context_for_next_testing_agent: Database Management System fully functional. Login endpoint is /api/auth/login (not /api/saas-admin/login). All database management APIs work correctly: GET /api/saas/databases returns list with main+tenant+agent databases, GET /api/saas/databases/stats returns statistics, POST /api/saas/databases/{id}/backup creates backup with operation log, POST /api/saas/databases/{id}/freeze toggles freeze status. UI shows stats cards, database table with actions, and sub-tabs for backups/logs/reports.

api_get_databases.description: Returns list of all databases (main, tenant, agent) with size, status, owner info

api_get_stats.description: Returns total_databases, total_size, active/inactive counts, backups count

api_get_logs.description: Returns operation logs (backup, freeze, unfreeze, export, delete)

api_get_backups.description: Returns list of saved backups with size, status, created_at

api_create_backup.description: Creates backup and returns backup_id, size_mb. Also creates operation log.

api_freeze_database.description: Freezes/unfreezes tenant database. Main database correctly rejects freeze.

api_export_database.description: Exports database to JSON file download

ui_database_tab.description: Database Management tab shows in SaaS Admin page with correct header and description

ui_stats_cards.description: 7 stats cards display: total databases, total size, active, inactive, backups, last backup, alerts

ui_database_table.description: Table shows databases with name, type badge, owner, size, documents count, status, last activity, actions

ui_sub_tabs.description: 4 sub-tabs work: قواعد البيانات, النسخ الاحتياطية, سجل العمليات, التقارير
